final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for OPPO Find X9 Yta, a brand exposure campaign.

Style/medium: bold product poster, high-impact commercial advertising style
Composition: full-screen product showcase, centered hero layout, 9:16 vertical format
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Yta smartphone as the focal point, sleek modern design with minimal bezels
Scene/backdrop: clean gradient or abstract tech-inspired background that amplifies the device
Lighting/mood: dramatic studio lighting with subtle rim light to highlight device edges, premium and aspirational mood
Color palette: brand-aligned colors with strong contrast for visual impact, device as the color anchor
Text (verbatim): "OPPO" "Find X9 Yta"
Constraints: must read clearly at thumbnail size; brand logo "OPPO" must be prominent
Avoid: cluttered layout, generic stock photo aesthetics, watermarks, excessive text, deformed device proportions
